description.en: Attacks an enemy and <color=#28d9ed>heals</color> the caster by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>回復する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使自身的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

description.en: Grants an ally increased <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
description.jp: 味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 아군 한 명의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 使1名友军的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>和<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续\n<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Increases the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
description.jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPさせる。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAt the start of the turn, removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff</color> from the caster.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nターン開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n턴 시작 시 자신에게 걸려 있는 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1</color>개 제거합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n回合开始时,解除自身附带的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>。
